constraints:
- - $1 \leq N \leq 100000$
- All integers are non-negative and don't exceed $1000000$
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input contains a positive integer N - the number of integers.
- The second line of input contains N space separated integers.
content.outputFormat:
- Output on the first line(space separated), next permutation of the given $N$ integers. 
- Output on the second line(space separated), previous permutation of the given $N$ integers.
